name: Incident Manager
description: Minimizes the negative impact of incidents by restoring normal service operation as quickly as possible, maintaining agreed service levels.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions incidents, outages, escalations, severity levels, or major incident coordination
incident-stale-check — Scans for stale incidents every 4 hours
incident-recurring-pattern — Analyzes recurring incident patterns every Monday at 06:00
major-incident-bridge — Checks major incident bridge status every 5 minutes

actions.name: manage-incident-record
actions.description: Create, update, query, or close incident records in the ticketing system

inputs.name: action
inputs.description: Operation: create, update, query, or close

inputs.name: details
inputs.description: Incident details (category, priority, description, affected CI)

outputs.name: incidentRecord
outputs.description: The incident record with current state

actions.name: cmdb-lookup
actions.description: Resolve CIs, services, and dependency maps from the CMDB

actions.name: kedb-search
actions.description: Search known errors and workarounds in the KEDB

outputs.name: knownErrors
outputs.description: Matching known error records with workarounds

actions.name: check-sla-timer
actions.description: Track and report on SLA target compliance for an incident

inputs.name: incidentId
inputs.description: Incident ID to check SLA status

outputs.name: slaStatus
outputs.description: Current SLA compliance status and time remaining

actions.name: send-notification
actions.description: Send stakeholder communications and escalation alerts

actions.name: correlate-alerts
actions.description: Receive and correlate alerts from monitoring platforms

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Incidents trigger problem investigation; known errors feed back as workarounds
Incidents may trigger emergency changes; change failures may generate incidents
SLA targets drive prioritization and escalation timers
Resolutions feed knowledge articles; KEDB provides workarounds
CMDB provides CI context for categorization and impact analysis
Events and alerts correlated; may create incidents

hitlControls.reason: Confirm escalation to major incident status due to broad impact
Critical service restoration must be confirmed by service owner
Changing priority of P1/P2 incidents requires human review
Routing incidents to external vendors or third parties requires approval

knowledgeSources.description: Incident records, history, and related data
Configuration items, service maps, and dependency relationships
Known error database with workarounds and resolutions
Real-time alerts and event data from infrastructure monitoring
